applications.title: Comprehensive Thermal Dissipation Solutions
applications.subtitle: Providing professional thermal management solutions for various industries from consumer electronics to industrial applications

consumerElectronics.title: Consumer Electronics
consumerElectronics.description: In the consumer electronics field, we focus on solving thermal dissipation challenges for laptops, smartphones, gaming consoles, and wearable devices. As electronic products continue to upgrade in functionality, heat generation increases accordingly. Through innovative thermal design, high-performance material selection, and precise thermal flow simulation, we ensure products maintain optimal temperatures during high-performance operation. Our solutions not only enhance product stability and lifespan but also improve user experience.
consumerElectronics.app1: Laptop Heat Dissipation - High-performance thermal modules ensure extended operation without throttling
consumerElectronics.app2: Smartphone Cooling - Ultra-thin liquid cooling design for maximum efficiency in limited space
consumerElectronics.app3: Gaming Console Thermal Management - Multi-layer architecture supports extended high-performance gaming
consumerElectronics.app4: Wearable Device Heat Management - Lightweight solutions balance comfort with performance

unmanned.title: Unmanned Vehicles
unmanned.description: Unmanned vehicles such as drones and autonomous vehicles generate substantial heat during high-performance operation. We provide professional thermal management solutions ensuring unmanned vehicles maintain stable performance during extended flight or operation. Through optimized thermal design and material selection, we help customers extend flight time, enhance safety, and improve reliability.
unmanned.app1: Drone Heat Dissipation - Lightweight design maximizes flight endurance
unmanned.app2: Autonomous Vehicle Battery Cooling - High-performance systems ensure extended operation
unmanned.app3: Flight Control System Temperature Control - Precision control ensures flight stability
unmanned.app4: Power Battery Thermal Management - Professional modules extend battery lifespan

wearables.title: Wearable Products
wearables.description: Smart glasses and AR/VR wearable devices represent the next generation computing platform, presenting unprecedented thermal dissipation challenges. We have specifically developed innovative thermal solutions for smart glasses, achieving high-performance thermal dissipation within extreme space constraints. Through advanced thermal conductive materials and precision thermal management design, we ensure devices maintain comfortable temperatures during extended wear while preserving slim and elegant product form factors.
wearables.app1: AR/VR Glasses Heat Dissipation - Invisible thermal design maintains aesthetics
wearables.app2: Smart Glasses Temperature Control - Comfortable temperature when worn on skin
wearables.app3: Wearable Device Cooling - Lightweight design without adding wearing burden
wearables.app4: Thermal Conduction Module Design - Innovative micro-channel technology

industrial.title: Industrial & Communications
industrial.description: The industrial and communications sectors have the most stringent thermal management requirements. Server cabinets, 5G base stations, industrial computers, and high-power power supplies must operate stably for extended periods in high-temperature, high-humidity, and high-dust environments. We provide enterprise-grade thermal dissipation solutions including fanless designs, liquid cooling systems, and modular heat exchangers. These solutions not only enhance equipment reliability but also reduce operational costs and energy consumption.
industrial.app1: Server Cabinet Heat Dissipation - High-density design supports large-scale deployment
industrial.app2: 5G Base Station Cooling - Extreme environment adaptability ensures signal stability
industrial.app3: Industrial Computer Fanless Design - Reduces failure rates and maintenance costs
industrial.app4: High-Power Power Supply Thermal Management - Efficient dissipation enhances energy conversion

automotive.title: Automotive
automotive.description: Thermal management needs in the automotive sector involve extreme conditions. Electric vehicle battery thermal dissipation and automotive electronics temperature control applications have extremely high reliability and performance requirements. We provide targeted solutions including high-performance thermal modules, advanced material applications, and innovative design concepts. These solutions help customers achieve higher efficiency, extended service life, and superior safety performance.
automotive.app1: Electric Vehicle Battery Heat Dissipation - Efficient dissipation ensures battery lifespan and safety
automotive.app2: Automotive Electronics Thermal Management - Lightweight high-performance solutions
automotive.app3: Cooling System Thermal Management - Reliability and efficiency in parallel
automotive.app4: Powertrain Thermal Management - High-efficiency power conversion

conceptDesign.title: Concept & Design
conceptDesign.shortDesc: Conduct preliminary thermal assessment based on customer requirements and propose multiple feasible thermal dissipation solutions.
conceptDesign.fullDesc: In the early stages of a project, we conduct in-depth analysis of your product characteristics, application scenarios, and performance requirements. Through detailed thermal assessment, we identify potential thermal management bottlenecks. We consider space constraints, budget, manufacturing processes, and performance objectives to develop multiple feasible solutions. Each solution undergoes preliminary verification to ensure technical feasibility and economic rationality. Our design team works closely with you to select the optimal solution as the foundation for subsequent development.

simulationAnalysis.title: Simulation & Analysis
simulationAnalysis.shortDesc: Utilize professional software for detailed thermal simulation and structural analysis to predict potential issues.
simulationAnalysis.fullDesc: Using industry-leading simulation software such as Ansys and Flotherm, we perform multi-physics coupled analysis. Through three-dimensional thermal flow analysis (CFD), we accurately predict temperature distribution, flow field characteristics, and thermal stress. Combined with structural finite element analysis (FEA), we evaluate material stress and deformation. We comprehensively validate the design before tooling, significantly reducing trial-and-error costs and development cycles. Simulation results include detailed reports and visual analysis to provide scientific basis for subsequent decisions.

prototypeTesting.title: Prototype Testing
prototypeTesting.shortDesc: Rapidly manufacture functional prototypes and conduct real-world testing to verify result accuracy.
prototypeTesting.fullDesc: Based on optimized design, we rapidly manufacture functional prototypes for experimental verification. Using precision testing equipment such as infrared thermal cameras and temperature sensor arrays, we collect temperature data under real operating conditions. We compare simulation results with measured data to verify model accuracy. If deviations are found, we conduct root cause analysis and optimize model parameters. Prototype testing covers multiple operating conditions including ambient temperature, high temperature, and low temperature to ensure stable product performance across the entire working range.

productionManufacturing.title: Production & Manufacturing
productionManufacturing.shortDesc: Integrate supply chain resources to provide high-quality, efficient mass production services.
productionManufacturing.fullDesc: We establish long-term partnerships with premium global suppliers to ensure stable raw material supply. From precision mold development, injection molding, machining to assembly and testing, every step adheres to strict quality standards. We employ advanced automated equipment and processes to improve production efficiency and product consistency. We establish a comprehensive logistics system to ensure timely delivery. We can provide flexible production solutions based on order volume, from small-batch trial production to large-scale mass production.

qualityOptimization.title: Quality & Optimization
qualityOptimization.shortDesc: Continuously track product quality and perform design optimization based on market feedback.
qualityOptimization.fullDesc: After product launch, we establish a comprehensive quality tracking mechanism. Through customer feedback, field testing, and long-term reliability verification, we identify improvement opportunities. Based on actual operating data and market demand changes, we perform continuous design optimization. Optimization includes material selection, process improvement, cost reduction, and performance enhancement. We are committed to pursuing excellence, ensuring products maintain optimal performance and competitiveness throughout their lifecycle. We provide regular technical support and upgrade solutions.

about.pageDescription: A group of engineers passionate about thermodynamics, dedicated to transforming complex theories into elegant solutions.
about.storyPart1: Therlect was founded in 2019 by a group of experienced thermal and fluid engineers. We believe that thermal management is not only a science but also an art.
about.storyPart2: We have witnessed the rapid development of electronic product performance and solved the thermal dissipation challenges that followed. From early passive cooling to today's active liquid cooling and phase-change technology, we have always been at the forefront of technology.
about.storyPart3: Beyond thermal management, we have expanded our vision to infrared technology, exploring the broad applications of thermal energy to human health and industrial applications. We are not just your supplier, but your most trusted strategic partner in the field of thermal energy.
about.coreValuesSubtitle: Beliefs and principles that guide us forward

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We are not satisfied with the status quo and continuously explore the boundaries of thermodynamics, applying new technologies to more possibilities.

precision.title: Precision
precision.description: From simulation analysis to manufacturing, we pursue perfection in every data point and every tolerance.

partnership.title: Partnership
partnership.description: We work closely with customers to face challenges together. Your success is our greatest achievement.

about.ctaDescription: We are always looking for talented individuals passionate about thermodynamics. If you want to drive technological progress, welcome to join Therlect.
about.conflictFreeIntro: Therlect is committed to supporting responsible sourcing practices and pledges not to purchase or use conflict metals.
about.backgroundContent: Armed rebel organizations in the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC) and surrounding countries have caused numerous social and environmental problems through metal mining and trade, including human rights violations and armed violence. These metal minerals include Tantalum (Ta), Tin (Sn), Tungsten (W), Cobalt (Co), and Gold (Au). Metals from DRC and adjacent conflict regions are known as Conflict Minerals.
about.commitmentContent: To protect human rights and mitigate armed conflict in DRC and neighboring countries, Therlect supports the Conflict-Free Sourcing Initiative (CFSI) established by the Electronic Industry Citizenship Coalition (EICC) and the Global e-Sustainability Initiative (GeSi).
about.ourCommitmentContent: We are committed to implementing conflict-free procurement practices and will not knowingly purchase materials containing conflict minerals. We require all suppliers to comply with conflict-free sourcing standards and maintain transparent supply chain documentation.

technology.pageDescription: Therlect combines deep thermodynamic theory with innovative application technology to solve the most challenging thermal management problems for customers.
technology.thermodynamicsDescription: Our thermodynamic engineering team focuses on the generation, conversion, transfer, and utilization of thermal energy. Through advanced simulation analysis tools and rich practical experience, we can accurately predict thermal performance in real environments and provide optimized thermal design solutions.
technology.cfdDescription: Utilize cutting-edge CFD software for precise thermal flow simulation, optimizing airflow fields and temperature distribution.
technology.heatModuleDescription: Design high-efficiency, low-cost, and compact custom thermal modules tailored to different product requirements.
technology.coreTechnologiesSubtitle: We provide multiple thermal dissipation solutions, from passive cooling to active cooling, meeting different application needs.
technology.passiveCoolingShortDesc: Efficient thermal dissipation solutions without active power-driven systems
technology.passiveCoolingFeature1: No fans or liquid cooling systems, completely silent operation
technology.passiveCoolingFeature2: Utilizes natural convection and heat conduction principles
technology.passiveCoolingFeature3: Suitable for low-power and noise-sensitive applications
technology.passiveCoolingFeature4: Heat sink design and material selection are critical
technology.passiveCoolingApplicationsDesc: LED lighting, low-power power supplies, audio equipment, medical instruments, and other noise-sensitive applications.
technology.activeCoolingFeature1: Air cooling systems: Utilize fan-forced convection for high dissipation efficiency
technology.activeCoolingFeature2: Liquid cooling systems: Water or other liquid circulation suitable for ultra-high-power applications
technology.activeCoolingFeature3: Automatically adjust dissipation intensity based on temperature
technology.activeCoolingFeature4: Suitable for high-power and high-performance equipment
technology.activeCoolingApplicationsDesc: High-performance servers, data centers, gaming computers, industrial equipment, and aerospace applications.
technology.liquidCoolingShortDesc: Advanced liquid cooling technology for extreme thermal challenges
technology.infraredShortDesc: Innovative far-infrared applications for health and industrial use
technology.ctaTitle: Ready to Solve Your Thermal Challenges?
technology.ctaDescription: Our expert team is ready to provide customized solutions for your project. No matter how complex your needs are, we can find the most suitable solution.
